stemHtml: On approach, you get an indication that the landing gear may not be locked down. You want a flyby inspection from the tower. What is the correct phraseology and element order?

options.a: "3x Mayday - Station - Your callsign - Intention - Reason - ..."
options.b: "Pan Pan - Station - Your callsign - Intention - Reason - ..."
options.c: "3x Pan Pan Medical - Station - Your callsign - Reason - Intention - ..."
options.d: "3x Pan Pan - Station - Your callsign - Reason - Intention - ..."
